text: Which equipment of the following SOLAS PACK B life raft does not have?

options.text: A) Fishing tackle + food + drinking water
B) Fishing tackle + drinking water + bailer
C) Fishing tackle + sea sick bags + drinking water

explanation: SOLAS Pack B life rafts are designed for coastal voyages and carry reduced equipment compared to Pack A; they notably omit the more comprehensive food rations, drinking water, and certain fishing equipment found in the oceanic Pack A.
